failures.summary: Temperature reads 299 K in run RUN-A001, 4 sigma above nominal 297

analysis.summary: Temperature anomaly observed in run RUN-A001 was not observed in run RUN-A002 at the same timestamp

open_questions.question: Were RUN-A001 and RUN-A002 carried out in different vessels or with different temperature setpoints?
open_questions.why_it_matters: would explain why one run shows a temperature deviation and the other does not

narrative: Two runs carry the same nominals; only RUN-A001 shows a Temperature deviation at 24h. Investigate whether the runs differed operationally.
